title: Demand map
subtitle: What people around you are looking for and offering — join a group demand or offer a service.
empty: Nothing here right now — pan the map or enable more layers.
join_note: Joining is soft and reversible — only signing an offer commits you.
anonymous_members_note: Members chose to stay anonymous — only numbers are shown.
no_offers: No offers yet — everyone gets notified the moment a supplier offers.
already_signed_other: You already signed another offer in this pool
cancellation_ph: Part of the signed contract — e.g. free cancellation up to a week before
supplier_subtitle: Group demand and wishes waiting for a supplier near
supplier_no_location: This rikma has no location yet — showing all demand. Set a location to rank by proximity.
supplier_empty: No matching demand right now. Check back later or widen the area.
add_supply_title: What would you like to offer?
add_supply_sub: Your supply is shown to customers, the concierge and weaves
add_mission_hint: A priced service: what, for how much and where
add_resource_hint: Equipment, space or capacity — for partnership or sale
add_product_hint: A fixed-price product customers buy directly
add_threshold_hint: Pick an existing demand pool on the map and make an offer
supply_sugg_sub: Products and services already offered on the site — maybe this is what you're looking for? Suppliers: a great basis for a threshold offer.
supply_sugg_cta: Make a threshold offer based on your supply
lev_panel_sub: Live demand and supply — wishes, pools, missions and resources from all weaves.
hub_teaser_sub: What people seek and offer right now — pools and weaves together.
